prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 18units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.3 kg; Height 168.8 cm; BMI 20.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.8kg; 9 months ago 53.9kg; 6 months ago 57.1kg; 3 months ago 53.3kg; current 57.3kg), Height (12 months ago 168.8cm; 9 months ago 168.8cm; 6 months ago 168.8cm; 3 months ago 168.8cm; current 168.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 64U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 62U/L), AST (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 41U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 191mg/g; 9 months ago 178mg/g; 6 months ago 166mg/g; 3 months ago 160mg/g; current 113mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 9.4g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.65 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
